title: 字节跳动Dreamina将推Seedance 2.0 mini
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Rohan Paul
@rohanpaul_ai
Rumors suggest Dreamina (operated by ByteDance) is preparing a smaller new Seedance release.
The buzz says Dreamina Seedance 2.0 mini could land on June 15, bringing near-Seedance 2.0 quality without the same painful price tag.
For creators who love Seedance but not the bills, ome.
For a while, everyone focused on raw output quality. Now the bigger question is: how many serious attempts can you make before the process becomes too slow or expensive?
Better AI video for less money is always nice.
#dreamina #seedance #dreaminaseedance2mini
You can try it here.
